title: Circuit Breaker Pattern
description: Implement the circuit breaker pattern for resilient service calls with configurable thresholds and automatic recovery.
requirements: Implement three states: Closed, Open, HalfOpen
Accept failure threshold and timeout parameters
Implement Execute(func() (interface{}, error)) returning result or error
Track consecutive failures to trip the breaker
Automatically transition to HalfOpen after timeout
Reset to Closed on successful call in HalfOpen state
Return ErrCircuitOpen when breaker is open

few_shot_examples.code:
type State int

const (
    StateClosed State = iota
    StateOpen
    StateHalfOpen
)

type CircuitBreaker struct {
    state         State
    failures      int
    threshold     int
    timeout       time.Duration
    lastFailure   time.Time
    mutex         sync.RWMutex
}

few_shot_examples.prompt: Check if circuit should transition from open to half-open.
